task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the manufacturer datasheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, text editor, or spreadsheet application displaying the contents of '~/manufacturer_datasheet.csv' showing aircraft models and their weights in grams.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the Aircraft registry in the Aerobridge database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Aerobridge web interface, specifically the list of 'Aircraft' records within the 'registry' app.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent updated the Mavic 2 Pro mass to 0.907 kg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Aerobridge edit page for the 'Mavic 2 Pro' aircraft showing '0.907' in the mass field, or a list view/success message confirming the mass was saved as 0.907.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent updated the Autel Evo II mass to 1.15 kg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Aerobridge edit page for the 'Autel Evo II' aircraft showing '1.15' in the mass field, or a list view/success message confirming the mass was saved as 1.15.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent updated the Parrot Anafi mass to 0.32 kg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Aerobridge edit page for the 'Parrot Anafi' aircraft showing '0.32' in the mass field, or a list view/success message confirming the mass was saved as 0.32.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Aerobridge web interface to make updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Aerobridge UI to edit records, rather than using terminal commands (like SQL or Django shell) to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent correctly converted the weights from grams to kilograms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The entered mass values are decimals representing kilograms (e.g., 0.907) and not the raw gram values from the CSV (e.g., 907).

integrity.description: The agent did not incorrectly modify the distractor aircraft.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Custom Heavy Lifter' aircraft is not edited, or if visible in the list view, its mass remains 25.5 kg.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The datasheet is located at /home/ga/manufacturer_datasheet.csv. The correct converted mass values to look for are: Mavic 2 Pro = 0.907 kg, Autel Evo II = 1.15 kg, and Parrot Anafi = 0.32 kg. A distractor aircraft named 'Custom Heavy Lifter' has an initial mass of 25.5 kg and should not be modified.
